studies.title: Evaluation of the effectiveness of an online-based support program for the treatment of depression (Novego®) - A randomized controlled trial

_verification.reason: The study is specifically about the Novego program, not deprexis. Although deprexis is mentioned in the context of similar programs, the intervention being evaluated is Novego.

studies.title: Autism Spectrum Disorder in Adulthood: Pilot Study on the Applicability and Effectiveness of an Online Therapy and Accompanying Assessment of Comorbid Disorders and Psychosocial Parameters

_verification.reason: The study is about an online therapy program for adults with Autism Spectrum Disorder, not about deprexis. Although deprexis is mentioned as an example of an effective online therapy for depression, it is not the focus of this study.

studies.title:
Implementation of a digital nurse to improve the use of digital health applications for older people with depressive disorders (DiGA4Aged) -
A randomized proof of concept study.

_verification.reason: The study mentions 'deprexis' as one of the two DiGAs approved for depression treatment, but it does not focus specifically on 'deprexis'. The study is about increasing the usage rate of digital health applications in general for older patients with depression, not specifically about 'deprexis'.

studies.title: Digital health applications for older people with depressive disorders – pilot study

_verification.reason: The study specifically evaluates the usability of the digital therapeutic product 'deprexis' for older adults with depression, as mentioned in the full text. The product name 'deprexis' is explicitly stated as one of the two DiGA being tested.

_classification.reason: The study described is a pilot study focused on assessing the usability of digital health applications for older adults with depression. It involves testing applications with participants and conducting interviews, which are qualitative methods, not a primary RCT or RWE study.
